ACKS-INFLUENCE.app.title: Influence
ACKS-INFLUENCE.field.gmAdjustmentHint: Generic catch-all bucket added to the total (e.g. Bargaining, Command, or any situational bonus not listed).
ACKS-INFLUENCE.field.finalModifierHint: The total applied to the roll. You can type over it to override; the difference is stored as a GM adjustment. Use Reset to defaults to clear it.
ACKS-INFLUENCE.action.resetHint: Re-detect Charisma, Will, alignment and proficiencies from the character and current target, discarding manual overrides for this tone.
ACKS-INFLUENCE.auto.badge: Auto-populated — you can override this value.
